text:
The cited title "Quanstentheoretische beiträge zum benzolproblem: Ii. quantentheorie der induzierten polaritäten" is clearly identifiable as the second installment of Hückel's famous series. The AbeBooks listing explicitly identifies this paper as "Quanstentheoretische Beiträge zum Benzolproblem II. Quantentheorie der induzierten Polaritäten in Zeitschrift für Physik 72, pp. 310-337, 1931" — note the "Quansten-" spelling in the listing title matches the cited reference exactly, indicating this is a known typographic/OCR variant. The paper is real (Erich Hückel, Zeitschrift für Physik, 1931), and the author matches perfectly. The "Quansten-" spelling in the cited title is a known OCR/transcription error for "Quanten-", and the volume difference (cited as 1931 but appearing in vol. 72 rather than vol. 70) is simply because Part II appeared in a different volume of the same journal in the same year.

EXPLANATION: The cited reference is the real Part II of Hückel's famous "Quantentheoretische Beiträge zum Benzolproblem" series, published in Zeitschrift für Physik 72, pp. 310–337 (1931). The "Quansten-" spelling in the title is a well-documented OCR/transcription error for "Quanten-", and all other metadata (author, venue, year, subtitle) match exactly.
